glsa.title: DTrace: Arbitrary file creation via dtprobed
glsa.synopsis: A DTrace component, dtprobed, allows arbitrary file creation through crafted USDT provider names.

background.p: DTrace is a dynamic tracing tool for analysing or debugging the whole system. Specifically, dtprobed is a component of the DTrace system that keeps track of USDT probes within running processes, parsing and storing the DOF they provide for later consumption by dtrace proper.

description.p: A vulnerability has been found in dtprobed that allows for arbitrary file creation through specially crafted USDT provider names.

impact.p: The worst possible outcome is the ability for an attacker to run arbitrary code via the maliciously created file.

workaround.p: There is no known workaround at this time.

resolution.p: All DTrace users should upgrade to the latest version:
